sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ هِيَ الرُّكْنُ الثَّانِي مِنْ أَرْكَانِ الْإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is the second pillar of Islam.

sentences.arabic: يُحَافِظُ الْمُسْلِمُ عَلَى الصَّلَوَاتِ الْخَمْسِ فِي أَوْقَاتِهَا الْمُحَدَّدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman čuva pet dnevnih namaza u njihovo određeno vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim maintains the five daily prayers at their prescribed times.

sentences.arabic: ذَكَرَ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ بَازٍ أَنَّ الصَّلَاةَ صِلَةٌ بَيْنَ الْعَبْدِ وَرَبِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Baz je spomenuo da je namaz veza između roba i njegovog Gospodara.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Baz mentioned that prayer is a connection between the servant and his Lord.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَنْهَى عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنْكَرِ وَتَشْرَحُ الصَّدْرَ.
sentences.translation: On odvraća od razvrata i zla i donosi smiraj u prsa.
sentences.translationEn: It restrains one from shameful and evil deeds and brings peace to the heart.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا أَنْ نَتَعَلَّمَ كَيْفِيَّةَ الصَّلَاةِ الصَّحِيحَةِ كَمَا صَلَّى النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ.
sentences.translation: Moramo naučiti kako ispravno klanjati onako kako je klanjao Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem.
sentences.translationEn: We must learn how to pray correctly just as the Prophet (peace be upon him) prayed.
